summary: A 2004 State Department cable from Embassy Ashgabat describes a Turkmen civil society NGO called the Union of UFOlogists of Turkmenabat, noting the group's history assisting local businesses and NGOs with registration; the cable reports the group's president said Turkmen military and government officials had consulted him about unusual occurrences in Turkmen airspace but that there had been no confirmed UFO sightings in Turkmenistan.
